message:
feat(algorithms): add random_tree (Prüfer sequence), navigable_small_world_graph (Kleinberg), k-clique/edge-cfbc bindings

New Rust implementations:
- random_tree: uniform random labeled tree via Prüfer sequence decoding
  with LCG PRNG. Verified: 10-node tree has 9 edges and is connected.
- navigable_small_world_graph: Kleinberg model on n×n 2D torus grid with
  local connections (Manhattan distance ≤ p) and q long-range directed
  edges per node with distance^(-r) probability.

Also adds PyO3 bindings for k_clique_communities_rust and
edge_current_flow_betweenness_centrality_rust.

478 public Rust functions, 700 Rust tests, 38,133 lines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
